title: Add Lead Console learning bootstrap and harden learning API contracts
summary: Introduced in-console learning question generation/preview and enforced stable wrapped+flat response contracts for learning generate/answer endpoints with automated contract verification.
changes: Added Learning Bootstrap controls and question preview to Lead Console.
Improved no-learning fallback copy to guide operator bootstrap flow.
Standardized generate/answer API responses with wrapper records (`question_record`, `result_record`) plus flattened top-level fields for compatibility.
Updated Learning page and Lead Console consumers to parse wrapped and legacy payloads.
Added deterministic learning API contract verifier script and npm hooks.
risks: API now carries dual-shape payload for compatibility; future cleanup should deprecate one shape explicitly to avoid long-term ambiguity.
rollback: Revert wrapper keys and UI bootstrap controls while retaining baseline learning endpoints.
